Title: Black Ice
Speaker: {operative.name}
Setting: Operations floor, emergency lighting, every screen red
TextLines: The comms went dead at 02:17. By 02:19 every alarm on the operations floor was screaming.

{operative.name} made it back. Barely. Field blacks torn at the shoulder, blood — not all {gender:m|his|hers} — streaked across the collar. The extraction vehicle is still burning three blocks from the {location} waterfront.
{operative.role:anchor} is running triage on the debrief data, pulling what they can from corrupted helmet feeds.
"We were made before we breached the perimeter," {operative.name} says, voice flat. "Someone fed them our approach vector. Exact coordinates. Exact timing."
The implication hangs in the emergency light like smoke.

Choices.Label: "Lock down all comms. Full security audit. Nobody leaves this floor."
"Get {gender:m|him|her} to medical. We'll figure out who talked later."
"Pull the access logs. I want names before sunrise."
